name: ReinforcementBase.ReinforcementRepresentationTypes
summary: The available reinforcement representation types. See Tekla Structures help, "Reinforcement appearance", for more information.

enum_values.name: SingleLine
enum_values.summary: A single line with radiused bends.

enum_values.name: DoubleLine
enum_values.summary: The outline of a bar with radiused bends.

enum_values.name: Filled
enum_values.summary: A solid bar with radiused bends.

enum_values.name: Stick
enum_values.summary: A single line without radiused bends.

enum_values.name: OutLine
enum_values.summary: Shows the shape of the mesh using an outline rectangle or polygon, and a diagonal line. Only applies to reinforcement meshes.

enum_values.name: DoubleLineFilledEnds
enum_values.summary: The outline of a bar with radiused bends and filled bar ends.

enum_values.name: SingleLineFilledEnds
enum_values.summary: A single line with radiused bends and filled bar ends.

enum_values.name: OutlineIgnoreHoles
enum_values.summary: Shows the shape of the mesh using an outline rectangle or polygon, and a diagonal line. It ignores the holes in the meshes. Only applies to reinforcement meshes.
